metadata.metric: kgCO2e per EUR 1 million revenue (Scope 1+2+3 combined)
metadata.methodology: EU country intensities derived from Eurostat ENV_AC_AINAH_R2 2022 GHG data combined with CDP 2024 Global Disclosure SME sector medians. Country adjustments apply GDP per capita ratios (World Bank 2022) and electricity grid emission factors (DEFRA 2025, ADEME 2024, national agencies). Non-EU countries use global CDP 2024 sector medians as fallback.
sources: Eurostat ENV_AC_AINAH_R2 (GHG by NACE sector, 2022) — ec.europa.eu/eurostat
World Bank World Development Indicators 2022 — data.worldbank.org
metadata.fallback: Countries not listed use global_median for their industry
